name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: Sacramento's ACE Cash Express at Elkhorn Blvd provides check cashing, cash advances, and financial services for North Sacramento residents.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express at 5227 Elkhorn Blvd in Sacramento, CA is a standalone check-cashing location serving the North Sacramento area. Open Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 7 PM, and Saturday 10 AM to 5 PM, this Sacramento-area branch provides quick financial services for residents of the surrounding neighborhoods.

This ACE Cash Express location specializes in check cashing, cash advances, payday loans, bill payments, and prepaid cards. For specific questions about services, fees, or eligibility requirements, call the Sacramento branch directly at 916-331-0545.

If you need quick access to cash or check-cashing services in Sacramento, this Elkhorn Blvd location is convenient and accessible. Bring a valid photo ID and the check or documentation you need; most services can be completed within minutes. ACE Cash Express serves as a fast alternative to traditional banks for time-sensitive financial needs.
pros: Multiple service offerings under one roof (check cashing, money transfers, bill payments, loans, tax services)
Physical store network enabling in-person same-day or next-day service
Online loan application option in addition to store-based services
Dedicated customer service phone lines for general inquiries and online loan support
State compliance programs including California Notice at Collection transparency
Business services available, expanding utility beyond consumer needs
Established multi-state operation with long-standing market presence
cons: Website lacks transparent APR rates, fees, and loan terms for any products
Significant geographic availability restrictions (services unavailable in some states)
Poor website functionality with 404 errors on location pages, suggesting maintenance issues
No published eligibility requirements or qualification criteria visible
Vague product descriptions without specific loan amounts, repayment periods, or interest rates
best_for: Consumers needing immediate check cashing or bill payment services at physical locations
Borrowers in states where ACE operates who need title loans or installment loans
Business owners seeking payroll or business financial services in ACE service areas
Unbanked or underbanked consumers preferring in-person financial transactions
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best suited for consumers who need quick, in-person financial services like check cashing, bill payments, or money transfers, or who qualify for title or installment loans in states where ACE operates. The critical caveat is the complete absence of transparent pricing, APR rates, and loan terms on their website—consumers must visit a store or call to understand actual costs, making online comparison shopping impossible.
meta_description: ACE Cash Express at 5227 Elkhorn Blvd, Sacramento, CA. Check cashing, cash advances, and quick financial services in North Sacramento.
